changes.reason: Call-wall acceptance is valuable but tail-heavy: only 2 VALID_0DTE trades produced $640.5 and $290/hour, but also the portfolio worst MAE at -655.2. The prior isolated move to max=5 improved score and net profit without reducing trade count, so this is the core containment lever.

Raise the forward DEX confirmation from 0.05 to 0.08, matching the prior small positive call-wall persistence result while avoiding the rejected 0.15 call-volume / 1.5B net-DEX tightening that suppressed profit.

Require a little more strike acceptance persistence before this rare convex profile fires. A 30 second setting is less aggressive than the prior 45 second sample-builder and should test whether the worst delayed realization was insufficiently persistent without starving the two-trade sleeve.

expected_effect: This should keep call_wall_acceptance_long active while improving acceptance quality and limiting adaptive target expansion. Promotion requires total net profit within 98% of run_044, trade count within 10%, PnL/exposure flat or better, and preferably lower call-wall average MAE or shorter exposure. Main tradeoff is losing or underpaying the rare $546 convex winner if persistence filtering is too strict.
label: call-wall-persistence-containment
rationale: Use one legal family: batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long. The current leader base is already strong, so the next test should isolate the only profile that owns the portfolio worst MAE while preserving its convex PnL contribution. This avoids global veto tightening, avoids stale/missing 0DTE behavior changes, and avoids repeating the rejected heavy call-volume/net-DEX tightening that cut over $1200 of profit.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long has only 2 VALID_0DTE trades but contributes $640.5, $290.3 per exposure hour, and the -655.2 worst MAE. Prior dynamic TP max=5 plus forward DEX 0.08 improved objective slightly without trade starvation, while heavier DEX/call-volume tightening hurt net profit.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call-Wall Acceptance Persistence Box
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample risk is high; stricter persistence may remove the largest winner and improve MAE only by suppressing profit.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE call-wall acceptance with positive forward DEX, expanding call flow, and strike acceptance that persists long enough to avoid transient wall touches.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Total risk-adjusted score improves versus run_044, total net profit remains >=98% of run_044, call-wall PnL retention >=70%, completed trades drop <=10%, PnL/exposure stays flat or better, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short 12.3-day, high-win-rate, take-profit-only long scalper regime. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are zero, so the objective is dominated by hidden MAE, recovery durati...

new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE below -655.2 toward <= -513.4 while retaining >=98% total PnL, >=90% affected-profile PnL, >=95% protected fast winners, and slow_12h remains 0.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor

new_strategy_ideas.name: Delta Charm Breakout Dormant Attribution Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Positive standalone PnL, no more than 10% degradation in squeeze/charm-wall combined PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, worst MAE no worse than -513.4.
